metadata.description: Reticle — a runtime UI evidence + action harness for Android apps, distributed as a Cursor plugin.

plugins.name: reticle
plugins.description: Runtime UI evidence + action harness for Android apps. Inspect the running app's view / accessibility / Compose-semantics / WebView DOM tree, resolve precise CSS selectors and per-phrase tap regions, inspect DOM style/image metadata, drive real input through adb, and live-patch UI properties without rebuilding.
